title: BetterSleeping
description: Allow players to take a quick nap to reset their Phantom timer. No need to force a global night skip! This is a per-player solution, so playeres only skip the night when everyone actually wants to.
body:
**BetterSleeping** is a modern, lightweight, and highly optimized sleep plugin designed for **SMP**s and **Survival** servers. **Instead of skipping the night globally and ruining the game for players who want to farm mobs, this plugin allows players to take a "nap"**. **Additionally if player sleep percentage requirement is filled it uses vanilla night skip so players can coordinate and sleep to skip night at will**

When a player enters a bed, a customizable progress bar appears in their Action Bar. Once it fills up, their personal ```TIME_SINCE_REST```
 statistic is reset meaning **Phantoms will no longer spawn for them**, **all without skipping the night for everyone else!**

**Individual Phantom Prevention:** Let players reset their own sleep schedule without forcing a global night-skip. Perfect for multiplayer servers!

**Restorative Naps**: Players can optionally regenerate health while resting in bed! Fully balanced for survival. configure how much they heal, how fast, and even make it consume hunger (with a safe minimum hunger limit) to keep things fair.

**Resumable Sleeping** (Grace Period): If a player accidentally clicks out of bed or gets nudged, they won't lose their progress! They have a configurable grace period to get back into bed and resume where they left off.

**Fully Configurable**: Change the sleep duration, health regen rates, grace period, timer speeds, progress bar characters, colors, and all messages.

----
**Optimized with low-end servers on mind for max performance**
